title: Top 5 Claude Cowork Tips I Wish I Knew from Day One
summary: Jeff Su shares five essential tips for setting up and managing Claude Cowork effectively, covering practices like keeping root documentation lean, structuring memory files, archiving outdated content, migrating projects, and distinguishing between skills and workstations. These recommendations are drawn from three months of running a business on the platform.
